scripts.format: bunx @biomejs/biome@2.5.4 format --write biome.jsonc package.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json .agents/plugins/marketplace.json hooks runtime scripts tests packages skills assets integrations
scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/installer typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/codex-container-lab/cli typecheck && bun run --cwd skills/codex-project-tooling/assets/fastmcp-bun-template typecheck
scripts.verify: bun run check && bun run typecheck && bun run plugin:check && bun test
